$comment: Project-local Claude Code settings. Hooks below enforce docs-sync discipline so the agent doesn't declare a feature complete with stale README/openapi/CLAUDE.md.

hooks.$comment: Cheap migration-count check after every Edit/Write. Surfaces drift immediately when a new migration is added but README count is stale.
Full drift check before Claude can mark the conversation complete. Surfaces every gap so the agent has a chance to fix them in this turn.
